column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Texas Rangers designated outfielder Jarred Kelenic for assignment after a disappointing start to his season.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• The Rangers signed free agent RHP Chris Paddack to a major league contract.
• Los Angeles Dodgers activated outfielder Teoscar Hernández from the 10-day injured list.
• San Diego Padres activated second baseman Jake Cronenworth from the 7-day injured list.
• Washington Nationals placed LHP Mitchell Parker on the 15-day IL with left elbow inflammation.
• Baltimore Orioles placed LHP Keegan Akin on the 15-day injured list with left elbow discomfort.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
